name: Nearly Brownie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
3. Melt the semisweet chocolate and butter in a small pan over low heat, stirring until smooth, or in the microwave.
4. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. In a bowl, beat eggs, sugar, and vanilla at high speed until well combined.
6. Slowly beat in the cooled chocolate mixture.
7. Stir in the dry ingredients until just blended but smooth.
8. Stir in the chocolate bits and pecans.
9. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls, 1 inch apart, onto prepared cookie sheets.
10. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, taking care not to overbake.
11. Remove from oven and cool on a rack.
Yield: 50 to 60 cookies
